violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Some cutting boards noted not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Some food equipment exteriors noted in need of deep cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors under equipment under 3-compartment sink and in walk in cooler noted in need of cleaning. Vent covers in kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls by the 3-compartment sink noted in need of cleaning.
